mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reagent_batch ( reagent_id, batch_number, production_date, expiry_date, opened_expiry_days, opened_date, initial_quantity, current_quantity, unit_price, storage_location, supplier_id, status, remark, create_time ) VALUES ( #{reagentId}, #{batchNumber}, #{productionDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{openedExpiryDays}, #{openedDate}, #{initialQuantity}, #{currentQuantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{storageLocation}, #{supplierId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE reagent_batch
batch_number = #{batchNumber},
production_date = #{productionDate},
expiry_date = #{expiryDate},
opened_expiry_days = #{openedExpiryDays},
opened_date = #{openedDate},
initial_quantity = #{initialQuantity},
current_quantity = #{currentQuantity},
unit_price = #{unitPrice},
storage_location = #{storageLocation},
supplier_id = #{supplierId},
status = #{status},
remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM reagent_batch WHERE reagent_id IN
#{reagentId}
